case_title: MARK IGNATIUS ET AL VS. ROMMEL C MAPAYE

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IGNATIUS, MARK LUNEAU, MADELEINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAPAYE, ROMMEL C $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,575.00, REIMBURSEMENT OF PARTIES OF DEPOSIT THAT WAS WITHHELD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-30-2023 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY IGNATIUS, MARK LUNEAU, MADELEINE AS TO DEFENDANT MAPAYE, ROMMEL C ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-30-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-30-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-30-2023 BY JUDGE MURLENE J. RANDLE. PLAINTIFF MARK IGNATIUS IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF MADELEINE LUNEAU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ROMMEL C MAPAYE IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF PRESENT PROOF OF SERVICE BY PERSONAL SERVICE WHICH HAS NOT BEEN FILED WITH THE COURT. DEFENDANT WAIVES PROOF OF SERVICE TO MOVE FORWARD FOR TRIAL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MURLENE J. RANDLE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
